services.name: 2D-to-BIM Conversion (PDF / DWG to Revit)
services.summary: Convert legacy CAD drawings and scanned plans into clean, coordination-ready Revit models.
deliverables: Accurate Revit model from PDF, DWG, or hand sketch
LOD 200–300 geometry (upgradeable to LOD 400 on request)
Correct Revit categories, families, and naming conventions
IFC export for interoperability
Applicable to: residential, commercial, industrial buildings

services.name: Parametric Revit Family Creation (LOD 300–400)
services.summary: Custom parametric families built for precise BIM integration.
deliverables: Structural, architectural, or MEP components
LOD 300–400 geometry with fully configured instance/type parameters
Embedded metadata: material, load, fire rating, and specification data
ISO 19650-compliant naming and classification
Tested in a live Revit project environment before delivery

services.name: 4D/5D Construction Simulation & Clash-Free BIM Coordination
services.summary: Full multidisciplinary BIM coordination under ISO 19650.
deliverables: Coordinated Revit model (LOD 300–400, all disciplines)
Navisworks Clash Detective report (hard, soft, workflow clashes)
4D construction sequence simulation (Timeliner-linked schedule)
5D cost-linked model with element-level BOQ quantities
ISO 19650-compliant BEP summary document
IFC export for software-neutral interoperability

services.name: Technical BIM Debugging & FEA Rescue (Revit / ETABS / PLAXIS)
services.summary: Diagnostic and correction service for non-converging models and coordination issues.
deliverables: Corrected model file with full root-cause documentation
Code-compliance verification for corrected parameters
Screen walkthrough recording for complex interventions
Applicable to: Revit, Navisworks, ETABS, SAP2000, PLAXIS

services.name: Basic Structural Analysis & Model Verification
services.summary: Senior-level review and verification of structural models.
deliverables: Model audit: geometry, boundary conditions, load applications, diaphragm assignments
Load combination review and correction per applicable code (BNBC 2020, ASCE 7-22, Eurocode)
Basic frame/member check with pass/fail summary
Corrected model file returned

services.name: Complete Structural Analysis & Design — RCC / Steel
services.summary: Full structural design package for buildings of any typology.
deliverables: ETABS / SAFE / STAAD.Pro structural model (gravity + lateral load combinations)
Response spectrum analysis (BNBC 2020, ASCE 7-22, or Eurocode 8)
Seismic + wind drift verification, P-Delta effects checked
Member sizing and reinforcement design (ACI 318-19, AISC 303-22, or Eurocode)
Foundation design (isolated, combined, or raft — with SAFE slab analysis)
Full structural calculation report and drawing mark-ups

services.name: Forensic Seismic Peer Review & Nonlinear Pushover Analysis
services.summary: Advanced nonlinear assessment for new designs and existing/damaged structures.
deliverables: Nonlinear static (pushover) analysis in ETABS or Perform3D
Plastic hinge formation map and capacity curve (force vs. displacement)
Performance point identification (ATC-40 / FEMA 440 capacity spectrum method)
Strong-column / weak-beam compliance verification
Peer review report with findings, risk flags, and design recommendations
Applicable to new design, existing structures, and post-fire or post-damage assessment

services.name: Basic Geotechnical Modeling & Analysis (PLAXIS 2D/3D)
services.summary: Focused numerical analysis for small-to-mid scale geotechnical problems.
deliverables: PLAXIS 2D or 3D model for settlement, slope stability, or consolidation problems
Settlement profile or factor of safety with sensitivity checks
One-page results summary plus full PDF report
Input files returned with deliverables

services.name: Advanced Geotechnical FEA — Soil-Structure Interaction & Dynamic Analysis
services.summary: High-fidelity FEA for complex underground and foundation engineering challenges.
deliverables: Full SSI model with advanced constitutive models (HS, HS-Small, UBC3D-PLM, Norsand)
Dynamic loading analysis: vibration propagation, TBM effects, seismic response
Liquefaction screening and cyclic instability assessment
Settlement contours, vibration amplitude profiles, and safe operation corridor definition
Applicable to: tunnels, deep foundations, retaining structures, metro infrastructure

services.name: Photorealistic Architectural Visualization (Twinmotion)
services.summary: Broadcast-quality renders and walkthroughs from existing CAD, IFC, or RVT files.
deliverables: Up to 5 high-resolution still renders (4K, path-traced lighting)
1 walkthrough animation (up to 60 seconds, MP4)
Exterior + interior scene setup (materials, lighting, landscaping)
Input accepted: DWG, IFC, RVT — modeling from sketches available on request

services.name: Engineering Automation & Parametric Analysis Scripts (Python / MATLAB)
services.summary: Custom scripts that eliminate repetitive manual calculation workflows.
deliverables: Load combination generators, section capacity checks, soil profile plotters
Result extractors from ETABS/PLAXIS output files
Commented, readable code with usage instructions and sample input/output demonstration
